prompt: Please do the task stated in `/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2_generation_prompts.md`, where the TASK_ID is `13f06aa5`.
codex_response:
Implemented the ARC2 package for `13f06aa5`. The rule is: each connected multicolor pointer uses its unique least-frequent tip cell to choose a border direction, that tip color projects outward every other cell toward that border, the full matching border line is painted in the same color, and orthogonal border-line corner overlaps become `0`.

I used the Opus hint only as a partial starting point and corrected it in [notes.md](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_13f06aa5/notes.md); the Sonnet hint was discarded as too vague. The task package is in [__init__.py](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_13f06aa5/__init__.py), [verifier.py](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_13f06aa5/verifier.py), and [generator.py](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_13f06aa5/generator.py). No new primitive was needed.

Verification passed end-to-end: 4/4 official examples, build of 1000 generated examples, and 1000/1000 generated examples re-verified. I also sanity-checked the rendered previews; they stay on-family with the same small pointer motifs, shared body color, and dotted step-2 projections. Artifacts are at [task.json](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/13f06aa5/task.json), [originals.png](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/13f06aa5/previews/originals.png), [preview_01.png](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/13f06aa5/previews/preview_01.png), [preview_02.png](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/13f06aa5/previews/preview_02.png), and [preview_03.png](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/13f06aa5/previews/preview_03.png).
